name: Jinduicheng Molybdenum Co., Ltd.
summary: Jinduicheng Molybdenum Co., Ltd. produces and sells molybdenum products worldwide. It offers molybdenum furnace products, including roasted molybdenum concentrate and concentrate blocks, molybdenum iron and concentrate blocks, and ferro molybdenum; and molybdenum chemical products, such as sodium molybdate, ammonium molybdate, pure molybdenum disulfide and oxide, and ammonium octamolybdate and heptamolybdate, as well as molybdenum trioxide, organic molybdenum, and others. The company also provides molybdenum metal products comprising molybdenum powders, slabs, rods, wires, wafers, crucibles, electrodes, mandrels, stirrers, components, moly stands, screws, nozzles, material boats, cakes, rings, orifices, etc.; spraying molybdenum wires; rolling molybdenum rods and plates; and welded molybdenum round targets, as well as nuts. In addition, it offers sulfur concentrate, sulfuric acid, and ferric sulfate powder. Its products are used in the areas of steel milling, petrochemical, mechanical manufacture, aerospace, electronics, lighting, etc. The company is headquartered in Xi'an, China. Jinduicheng Molybdenum Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Jinduicheng Molybdenum Group Co., Ltd.
